query:
SELECT id, name, phone, email, roles, createdAt
FROM users
WHERE 
  (name LIKE '%test%' 
  OR phone LIKE '%test%'
  OR email LIKE '%test%'
  OR name LIKE '%测试%'
  OR phone LIKE '%000%')
  AND phone NOT IN ('13860029testtest', '13800138013')
  AND email != '526test@example.com'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC;
